description.value: Your body incorporates a number of magical and technological components, granting you some innate magical power. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Ancestral Cantrip] feat from your ancestry or from the android ancestry. You're trained in the skill associated with the tradition of the cantrip you learned this way (Arcana for arcane, Religion for divine, Occultism for occult, or Nature for primal). If you would automatically become trained in that skill (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.
